problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: The key to What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue? is Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins — specifically Autophagy activation to — which would help 1,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
